title: Brookfield wants to build AI data centers in London’s answer to Wall Street
summary_full: Brookfield's CEO said the firm is bringing data centers to London's Canary Wharf, as demand for AI infrastructure in the U.K. soars.
summary_public: Brookfield's CEO said the firm is bringing data centers to London's Canary Wharf, as demand for AI infrastructure in the U.K. soars.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: demand for AI infrastructure in the U.K. soars
